description: Learn the fundamentals of building secure Solana programs using the Anchor framework.

modules.title: Module 1: Getting Started
modules.description: Setting up your environment and understanding PDAs.

children.text: Anchor is a framework for Solana's Sealevel runtime providing several convenient developer tools.

lessons.title: PDA Seeds and Bump
lessons.objective: Complete the 'create_vault' instruction so that the vault PDA uses correct seeds and constraints.
hints: Use `seeds = [b"vault", user.key().as_ref()]` in the account constraint.
Access the canonical bump via `ctx.bumps.vault` inside the instruction handler.
Always store the bump — it saves compute on future validations.

children.text: Complete the initialization struct to accept a payer.
